title: Claim Audit Schema
description: Schema for enforcing evidence-grounded claim audits in root-rag.

audit_date.description: The date the audit was performed (YYYY-MM-DD).

fairship_commit.description: The FairShip commit hash the audit is based on.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for the claim (e.g., CLM-SBT-001).

claim_text.description: The literal text of the claim being audited.

claim_state.description: The current validation state of the claim.

evidence_type.description: The type of evidence supporting the claim.

profile.description: The retrieval profile used (e.g., fairship, project_docs, root).

source.description: The file path or document identifier (e.g., arXiv ID).

line_range_or_section.description: Specific line range (e.g., 53-60) or document section (e.g., Section 5.3).

runtime_validated.description: Whether the claim has been validated via code execution.

physics_validated.description: Whether the claim has been validated by a subject matter expert in physics.

thesis_safe_sentence.description: A refined, evidence-grounded sentence suitable for inclusion in the thesis.

remaining_uncertainty.description: Description of any remaining doubts or missing evidence.
